name: Paulo Ruiz
background: Paulo Ruiz is President and Chief Operating Officer, Industrial Sector. He was appointed to this role in 2022. He joined Eaton in 2019 as President of the Hydraulics Group. Prior to Eaton, he spent more than 18 years with Siemens.

commpanies.name: Eaton Corporation plc
commpanies.title_or_role: President and Chief Operating Officer, Industrial Sector
